rationale: Gov't Code §2001.176 governs petitions for judicial review of contested agency cases. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote: A person initiates judicial review in a contested case by filing a petition not later than the 30th day after the date the decision or order that is the subject of complaint is final and appealable.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative judicial review procedure; proposed change to homestead exemption amount has no bearing on this statute.
